subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-26
subcodes.first_line: During the autocratic reign of Abdul Hamid, while I was closely incarcerated in the town of Acca, a man with a suspicious character called on me.
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
